name: ApeCoin (APE)
report: The attacker exploited a flawed token claiming mechanism by first using a flash loan from the NFTXVaultUpgradeable contract to temporarily acquire BAYC/MAYC NFTs. This allowed them to bypass the `claimTokens` function's balance check in the AirdropGraphsToken contract, which only verified current NFT ownership. After claiming the APE airdrop, the attacker returned the NFTs to repay the flash loan, illicitly obtaining approximately $350,000 worth of tokens.
